---
title: "Session 07_LinReg_PyTorch"
author: "God"
format: html
editor: visual
mainfont: Times New Roman
---

## Outline

1.  Linear Regression as a single-layer network
2.  D2L structures
3.  Implementation in PyTorch
4.  RHigh Level Implementation with nn library
5.  Generalization and Regularization in nn Regressions

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
